ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size option */,
  "size_name" TEXT /* Name of the size (e.g., 2, 3, 4) */,
  "bust" REAL /* Bust measurement for the size */,
  "waist" REAL /* Waist measurement for the size */,
  "hips" REAL /* Hips measurement for the size */,
  "hollow_to_floor" REAL /* Hollow to floor measurement for the size */,
  "size_description" TEXT /* Description of the size */,
  "size_type" TEXT /* Type of size (e.g., US, EU, UK) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clothing_items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each clothing item */,
  "item_name" TEXT /* Name of the clothing item */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the clothing item */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the clothing item */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the clothing item (e.g., women, men, kids) */,
  "sub_category" TEXT /* Sub-category of the clothing item (e.g., tops, bottoms, dresses) */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the clothing item */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the clothing item */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material of the clothing item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory entry */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clothing item */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size option */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the size option in stock */,
  "restock_level" INTEGER /* Restock level for the size option */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Reorder level for the size option */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES clothing_items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clothing item */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the image */,
  "image_type" TEXT /* Type of image (e.g., front, back, side) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_images_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES clothing_items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fabric_types" (
  "fabric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fabric type */,
  "fabric_name" TEXT /* Name of the fabric type */,
  "fabric_description" TEXT /* Description of the fabric type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fabric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "item_sizes" (
  "item_size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each item-size entry */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clothing item */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size option */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_item_sizes_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_item_sizes_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES clothing_items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "style_types" (
  "style_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each style type */,
  "style_name" TEXT /* Name of the style type */,
  "style_description" TEXT /* Description of the style type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("style_id")
)
